## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, CMS updates, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content audit planned to optimize 500+ existing blog posts and create high-quality pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [New CMS features implemented, including improved conversion panels and tagging system](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [20% increase in organic clicks week-over-week, with recently published content driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Ongoing technical issues with CMS migration being addressed, including conversion panel functionality](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit and Optimization Strategy

  - [Plan to audit existing content (nearly 500 blog posts) to identify optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Focus on creating pillar content and high-quality pieces](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Aida to analyze rank tracker data for past 6 months to identify underperforming content](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Devon to provide list of priority topics for pursuit](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Target content ranking on pages 3-5 for improvement to page 1-2](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### CMS Updates and Features

  - [Bug resolved for publishing recent blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [New "conversion panels" replace old CTA cards](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Shared component added for quick implementation of generalized conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [SEO section improvements: page titles, descriptions, Open Graph images](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [New tagging system: blog topics, tags, industries, and technologies](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [Plans for tag-based filtering and dedicated tag pages in the future](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [20% increase in organic clicks week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Top-performing content: partner page examples, B2B case studies, industry page design](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Recently published content (late Jan/early Feb) driving most traffic](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [GA4 data shared, but content-specific filtering still in progress](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Technical Challenges and Improvements

  - [Living between two CMSs with reverse proxy setup causing some issues](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Plans to fully transition to Sanity CMS in March](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Ongoing fixes for conversion panel display and CTA functionality](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [New features: embedded pillar sections, improved table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)

### Future Considerations

  - [Explore multi-stage CTAs to cater to users at different funnel stages](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Potential for service-specific conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1258.0)
  - [Team open to feedback on new features and page structure](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to publish last week's blog posts and begin content audit](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Devon to share list of priority topics for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Jesse to share Figma project and add Kyle to CMS for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Team to continue addressing technical issues with CMS migration](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [Devon to update on conversion panel fixes](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Kyle to share examples of multi-stage CTA designs](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
  - [Reschedule Monday's meeting to accommodate internal Webstacks meeting](https://fathom.video/share/SzegSo_dS4T6LCqe4XQkcf_s8Pngen5X?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
